summary: Wire articles-publish-md --post to the captured X Articles create/update/publish sequence.
reason: The generated low-level Articles endpoints worked live, but the hand-written markdown wrapper still stopped after dry-run. This X-specific patch keeps the agent-facing command aligned with the proven endpoint sequence.
validated_outcome: Live smoke test created and published an X Article through articles-publish-md --post using the renamed x-twitter config namespace.
